## [00:00 - 03:01]

Hi, this is Don Crowther with a video about the next step in your webinar, which is restating your benefits and proof. So you've done the bonuses, you've shown them the offer and the bonus stack. After that, we then go through this process of restating the benefits that they will receive from the program and providing them proof. So why are we doing this? Well, because at this point in the webinar, we've been logically selling for quite a while and it's time to get emotion back into the picture. So whenever we're doing a webinar, whenever we're doing any kind of sales presentation, we walk that fine balance between the emotional cell and the logical cell, remembering that the emotional cell is the prime cell for most people. That's what's going to sell the logical cell simply reaffirms the decision that they made emotionally to buy. Now, the easiest way to do this is simply to restate the benefits you offer and give them some proof. So here's a really simple line that will help you to do that. And here's what you get when you invest in your program name. So I find this works best with two slides, maybe a few more depending on how many benefits you really are offering. So the first one has the benefits of the program. Now, this is similar to the list you've already shown them. So you're not doing a brand new slide here. You're taking a slide you already have where you summarize the benefits of the program and showing it to them. The thing that is new is this next slide, which is you've just given them a bunch of bonuses. And those bonuses have benefits attached to them too. So there's benefits that come from the program and their benefits that come from the bonuses. And so this is a new list leading up to a third slide, which is the second level benefits that they receive from the program and the bonuses all put together. Now, many of these elements on this second level bonus slide are things you've already shown them. Remember the second level or the higher level benefits, what they get as a result of getting that benefit. And but this enables them to see themselves receiving these second level bonuses. And that can be incredibly motivating. So psychologically, what have we done here? We've taken them very quickly from logical mode back into emotional mode, and we've converted their thought process from is the stuff that I'm being promised enough to justify the price to yes, this transformation is exactly what I want in my life. That's what's making this sell for you. Then once we get that done, we reinforce these emotions with case studies and testimonials.

## [03:01 - 04:28]

This is very easy to say, like so and so who accomplished such and such or who received such and such a transformation in their life. And it's very simple to do this. Just you've shown them the bonuses and then you say, and for example, there's so and so who achieved this in their life as a result of this program. Now, this is a very simple process that I've just taken it taking you through, but there's a huge return that comes out of all this. So it very summarizing this. Here's what you get when you invest in this and you restate the benefits of the program. Plus, they get the benefits from the bonuses, giving you the second level benefits that will receive as a result of doing this, like so and so who got such and such and so and so who got this. So it's very clear. It's very easy to go through this process, but it's so important that you do so.
